case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSU VS. RUBEN E DULANTO et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MEIGGS, MABEL DOES 1 TO 10

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSU RANCE BUREAU,  A RECIPROCAL INTER-INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT DULANTO, RUBEN E MEIGGS, MABEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-24-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DULANTO, RUBEN E $6,882.16 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,882.16, TOTAL $ 6,882.16 SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH AS TO THE TERMS AND CONDITION RE PAYMENT PLAN. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-23-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR BEFORE HEARING BY COURT.
